title: Integration with MS Onenote
excerpt:
We use MS Onenote in several projects. Onenote is a wonderful tool for meeting agendas, documentation etc. 
I would like to send a Onenote page to a board, creating a pulse.

posts.author: Bjorn (Björn Eriksson)
posts.cookedHtml:
We use MS Onenote in several projects. Onenote is a wonderful tool for meeting agendas, documentation etc.

I would like to send a Onenote page to a board, creating a pulse.

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bjorn! Thanks for suggesting this one, I’ve added your request to our product team that will review this. Could you share a bit how this would improve your workflow on monday.com?

I look forward to seeing this come to life down the road!

posts.author: Bjorn (Björn Eriksson)
posts.cookedHtml: Top of mind is that we get a link between the pulse = project action and the specification and background material we have in Onenote. For tracking purposes.

posts.author: alejencia (Alex Becerra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bjorn,

This is a wonderful recommendation. Our department has the knowledge database in OneNote. I do too envision a link between the Pulse and OneNote material.

image.png1193×531 99.8 KB

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml: Great - thanks so much for sharing! We’ve taken your feedback for product to review, if you have any other ideas feel free to post them or add onto previous posts

posts.author: LauraF (Laura F)
posts.cookedHtml:
I know this conversation is a little old, but I wanted to add my use case to the request:

My team uses shared OneNote notebooks to collaborate, and Monday.com for project management. It would be ideal if we could create a pulse in Monday.com by using a specific tag in OneNote:

posts.author: Clemens_Mazza (Clemens Mazza)
posts.cookedHtml: This works with the external app Taskclone https://taskclone.com/

posts.author: BoboNoRulez (Luci Wataha)
posts.cookedHtml: This is old but bumping anyway. The other microsoft products are already part of the integration, being able to link shared training and other team knowledge databases out of one note to a specific task would be invaluable.

posts.author: DC5418 (DC5418)
posts.cookedHtml: Integration with Microsoft Onenote would be a great feature. Right now the only real option is to use links.

posts.author: LCenter (Lori)
posts.cookedHtml: Wanted to follow up on status of this as OneNote has the Loop Components feature that could easily be integrated with Monday.com to track actionable tasks, assign tasks, etc. This feature would eliminate a significant redundancy I am struggling with to bridge the gap with OneNote and Monday

posts.author: domenicamori (Domenica)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, is there any update on this feature? thanks

posts.author: KellyArco (Kelly Arco)
posts.cookedHtml: I just want to be able to share general information on my board. Like the latest officer’s list or the list of communities we serve. I keep this updated in One Note and it would be so nice to be able to have it readily available in Monday.

posts.author: RobertoJar (Roberto Alegria Jardim)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi everyone. We use One note for Meeting Minutes but would like an integration where a OneNote TO DO becomes an action item in Monday.com. Please let us know once this is available.
